stem.en: Review the postpartum client record and answer the case-study items.
stem.zh: 查看该产后患者病历，并回答病例题。

title.en: Postpartum preeclampsia with severe features after discharge
title.zh: 出院后出现有重症特征的产后子痫前期

summary.en: A 31-year-old G2P2 client presents on postpartum day 5 with a worsening headache, visual changes, RUQ/epigastric pain, and new swelling after an uncomplicated vaginal delivery and discharge on postpartum day 2.
summary.zh: 一名 31 岁 G2P2 产妇在产后第 5 天就诊。她产后第 2 天因顺产恢复顺利而出院，现在出现头痛加重、视觉变化、右上腹/上腹痛和新发水肿。

content.en: Delivered a healthy 3,400-g infant by uncomplicated vaginal delivery at 39 weeks 2 days. Prenatal blood pressures were below 130/80 with no proteinuria. Discharged postpartum day 2 with BP 124/78. On postpartum day 5, she reports a two-day worsening headache not relieved by ibuprofen and acetaminophen, flashing spots in her vision, and RUQ/epigastric pain. Partner reports new facial and hand swelling and irritability. Lochia is decreasing normally, she is voiding, and the newborn is breastfeeding well.
content.zh: 妊娠 39 周 2 天经阴道顺利分娩一名健康 3,400 g 新生儿。产前血压均低于 130/80，无蛋白尿。产后第 2 天出院时血压 124/78。产后第 5 天，她报告头痛已加重 2 天，布洛芬和对乙酰氨基酚无效，并有眼前闪光点和右上腹/上腹痛。伴侣报告她面部和手部新发肿胀，并较易烦躁。恶露逐渐减少，排尿正常，新生儿母乳喂养良好。

title.zh: 入院评估和实验室资料

content.en: BP 168/112, repeat 170/108. HR 92, RR 18, SpO₂ 97% RA, temperature 37.0 °C. Weight 72 kg, up from 69 kg at discharge. Facial and hand edema with tight rings. Fundus firm and midline two fingerbreadths below umbilicus; scant serosa lochia. Lungs clear. RUQ/epigastric tenderness. DTRs 3+ with four beats of ankle clonus. Headache 8/10 unrelieved by home analgesics; intermittent bilateral scotomata for about six hours. Platelets 118,000/µL, creatinine 1.2 mg/dL, AST 142 U/L, ALT 128 U/L, LDH 380 U/L, urine protein-to-creatinine ratio 0.28, and no schistocytes on admission smear.
content.zh: 血压 168/112，复测 170/108。心率 92 次/分，呼吸 18 次/分，室内空气 SpO₂ 97%，体温 37.0 °C。体重 72 kg，出院时 69 kg。面部和手部水肿，戒指变紧。宫底质硬居中，位于脐下两横指；恶露为少量浆液性。双肺清晰。右上腹/上腹压痛。深腱反射 3+，有 4 次踝阵挛。头痛 8/10，家庭止痛药无效；双侧间断视觉暗点约 6 小时。血小板 118,000/µL，肌酐 1.2 mg/dL，AST 142 U/L，ALT 128 U/L，LDH 380 U/L，尿蛋白/肌酐比 0.28，入院涂片未见裂红细胞。

content.en: Provider diagnoses postpartum preeclampsia with severe features based on severe-range BP, refractory headache, visual symptoms, RUQ/epigastric pain, elevated transaminases, creatinine rise, and falling platelets despite urine protein-to-creatinine ratio 0.28. Orders include magnesium sulfate 4 g IV loading dose followed by 1 g/hr, IV labetalol per severe hypertension protocol if systolic BP remains ≥160 or diastolic BP remains ≥110, Foley catheter, strict intake and output, continuous pulse oximetry, and hourly magnesium monitoring. During the loading dose the patient feels flushed and warm. BP is 162/104 after first labetalol dose, so 40 mg IV labetalol is given; BP decreases to 144/92.
content.zh: 医务人员根据重度范围血压、止痛药不能缓解的头痛、视觉症状、右上腹/上腹痛、转氨酶升高、肌酐上升和血小板下降诊断为有重症特征的产后子痫前期，尽管尿蛋白/肌酐比为 0.28。医嘱包括硫酸镁 4 g 静脉负荷剂量后以 1 g/hr 维持、若收缩压仍 ≥160 或舒张压仍 ≥110 按重度高血压方案给予静脉拉贝洛尔、留置导尿、严格记录出入量、持续脉搏氧监测和每小时镁剂监测。负荷剂量期间患者感到潮红和发热。首次拉贝洛尔后血压 162/104，因此给予拉贝洛尔 40 mg 静脉注射；血压降至 144/92。

content.en: BP stabilizes at 138/86 on magnesium sulfate 1 g/hr. RR 16, SpO₂ 97%, urine output 180 mL/4 hr, magnesium level 5.2 mEq/L. DTRs are 2+ without clonus. Headache decreases to 3/10 and scotomata resolve. Repeat labs: platelets 108,000/µL, AST 156 U/L, ALT 138 U/L, creatinine 1.3 mg/dL, LDH 410 U/L; rare schistocytes now identified. Provider is concerned for evolving HELLP syndrome and requests notification if platelets fall below 100,000 or symptoms worsen.
content.zh: 硫酸镁 1 g/hr 输注下血压稳定在 138/86。呼吸 16 次/分，SpO₂ 97%，4 小时尿量 180 mL，血镁 5.2 mEq/L。深腱反射 2+，无阵挛。头痛降至 3/10，视觉暗点消失。复查实验室：血小板 108,000/µL，AST 156 U/L，ALT 138 U/L，肌酐 1.3 mg/dL，LDH 410 U/L；现可见少量裂红细胞。医务人员担心 HELLP 综合征正在进展，并要求若血小板低于 100,000 或症状加重需通知。

title.zh: HELLP 综合征和镁剂监测

content.en: At 12 hours: platelets 94,000/µL, AST 168 U/L, ALT 152 U/L, LDH 680 U/L, creatinine 1.3 mg/dL, schistocytes present. Together, these findings support HELLP syndrome. Headache is 2/10 and vision is clear, but RUQ pain returns at 6/10. BP 142/88, RR 14, SpO₂ 96%, urine output 40 mL/hr, magnesium 5.8 mEq/L, DTRs 1+ with no clonus. The patient is alert but tearful and anxious.
content.zh: 12 小时时：血小板 94,000/µL，AST 168 U/L，ALT 152 U/L，LDH 680 U/L，肌酐 1.3 mg/dL，存在裂红细胞。这些发现共同支持 HELLP 综合征。头痛 2/10，视力清楚，但右上腹痛再次出现并达 6/10。血压 142/88，呼吸 14 次/分，SpO₂ 96%，尿量 40 mL/hr，血镁 5.8 mEq/L，深腱反射 1+，无阵挛。患者清醒，但流泪并焦虑。

stem.en: The nurse reviews the admission assessment and laboratory results. Highlight the findings that require immediate follow-up.
stem.zh: 护士查看入院评估和实验室结果。请标出需要立即进一步处理的发现。

segments.en: Temperature 37.0 °C.
Heart rate 92 and regular.
segments.zh: 心率 92 次/分，节律规则。

segments.en: Blood pressure 168/112, confirmed on repeat measurement in the opposite arm at 170/108 five minutes later.
segments.zh: 血压 168/112，5 分钟后在对侧手臂复测为 170/108。

segments.en: Respiratory rate 18. SpO₂ 97% on room air.
segments.zh: 呼吸频率 18 次/分，室内空气 SpO₂ 97%。

segments.en: Weight 72 kg; discharge weight on postpartum day 2 was 69 kg — a 3 kg gain in three days.
segments.zh: 体重 72 kg；产后第 2 天出院时体重 69 kg——3 天内增加 3 kg。

segments.en: The patient is alert and oriented to person, place, time, and situation.
segments.zh: 患者清醒，能正确说出人物、地点、时间和当前情况。

segments.en: Mild periorbital and facial puffiness and bilateral hand edema are present; her rings are now tight and she cannot remove them.
segments.zh: 双眼周围和面部轻度浮肿，并有双手水肿；戒指现在变紧，无法取下。

segments.en: Fundal height is two fingerbreadths below the umbilicus, firm and midline.
segments.zh: 宫底位于脐下两横指，质硬且居中。

segments.en: Lochia is serosa — scant, pinkish-brown, without clots or foul odor.
segments.zh: 恶露为浆液性，量少，粉褐色，无血块或恶臭。

segments.en: The second-degree laceration repair is well approximated with mild ecchymosis and no erythema, drainage, or dehiscence.
segments.zh: 二度裂伤修补处对合良好，有轻度瘀斑，无红肿、渗液或裂开。

segments.en: Breasts are bilaterally engorged, warm, and mildly tender, with colostrum expressed from both nipples; no masses or erythema are noted.
segments.zh: 双侧乳房胀满、温热、轻度压痛，双侧乳头可挤出初乳；未见肿块或红斑。

segments.en: Lungs are clear to auscultation bilaterally with no crackles or wheezes.
segments.zh: 双肺听诊清晰，无湿啰音或哮鸣音。

segments.en: Heart sounds are regular with no murmur, rub, or gallop.
segments.zh: 心音规则，无杂音、摩擦音或奔马律。

segments.en: Abdomen is soft with mild tenderness to palpation in the right upper quadrant and epigastrium.
segments.zh: 腹部柔软，右上腹和上腹部触诊有轻度压痛。

segments.en: Bowel sounds are present in all four quadrants.
segments.zh: 四个腹象限均可听到肠鸣音。

segments.en: Deep tendon reflexes are 3+ at the biceps and patellar tendons bilaterally with four beats of ankle clonus.
segments.zh: 双侧肱二头肌和髌腱深腱反射为 3+，并有 4 次踝阵挛。

segments.en: The patient reports a frontal bilateral headache rated 8 out of 10, constant, and not relieved by home analgesics.
segments.zh: 患者报告双侧额部头痛，评分 8/10，持续存在，且家庭止痛药无缓解。

segments.en: She describes intermittent scotomata — "flashing spots" in the peripheral visual fields bilaterally — present for approximately six hours.
segments.zh: 她描述双侧周边视野间断出现暗点/“闪光点”，已持续约 6 小时。

segments.en: Cranial nerves II through XII are grossly intact; no facial droop, speech difficulty, or focal motor or sensory deficits are present.
segments.zh: 第 II 至 XII 对脑神经粗测完整；无面瘫、言语困难或局灶性运动/感觉缺损。

segments.en: The patient voided 200 mL of clear yellow urine on arrival.
segments.zh: 患者到达时排出 200 mL 清亮黄色尿液。

segments.en: WBC is 9,800/µL and hemoglobin is 10.8 g/dL after discharge hemoglobin of 11.4 g/dL.
segments.zh: 白细胞 9,800/µL；血红蛋白 10.8 g/dL，出院时为 11.4 g/dL。

segments.en: Platelets are 118,000/µL; discharge platelets were 210,000/µL.
segments.zh: 血小板 118,000/µL；出院时血小板为 210,000/µL。

segments.en: Creatinine is 1.2 mg/dL; discharge creatinine was 0.7 mg/dL.
segments.zh: 肌酐 1.2 mg/dL；出院时肌酐为 0.7 mg/dL。

segments.en: AST is 142 U/L and ALT is 128 U/L.
segments.zh: AST 为 142 U/L，ALT 为 128 U/L。

segments.en: Coagulation studies show PT 12.4 seconds, INR 1.0, and fibrinogen 320 mg/dL.
segments.zh: 凝血检查显示 PT 12.4 秒、INR 1.0、纤维蛋白原 320 mg/dL。

segments.en: Urine protein-to-creatinine ratio is 0.28 with trace protein on urinalysis.
segments.zh: 尿蛋白/肌酐比值为 0.28，尿常规仅示微量蛋白。

segments.en: LDH is 380 U/L.
segments.zh: LDH 为 380 U/L。

segments.en: Peripheral blood smear shows no schistocytes on admission.
segments.zh: 入院时外周血涂片未见裂红细胞。

correct.en: The correct cues indicate postpartum preeclampsia with severe features: severe-range blood pressure, refractory headache, visual scotomata, RUQ/epigastric tenderness, hyperreflexia with clonus, rapid fluid accumulation, falling platelets, rising creatinine, elevated transaminases, and elevated LDH. Normal postpartum findings such as scant serosa lochia, firm midline fundus, mild perineal ecchymosis, early lactation engorgement, and a mild hemoglobin decline should not be highlighted. A urine protein-to-creatinine ratio below 0.3 does not rule out preeclampsia with severe features when severe hypertension and end-organ findings are present.
correct.zh: 正确线索提示产后子痫前期伴重症特征：重度范围血压、止痛药不能缓解的头痛、视觉暗点、右上腹/上腹压痛、反射亢进伴阵挛、快速液体潴留、血小板下降、肌酐升高、转氨酶升高和 LDH 升高。少量浆液性恶露、宫底质硬居中、会阴轻度瘀斑、早期泌乳胀奶和血红蛋白轻度下降等正常产后表现不应标出。即使尿蛋白/肌酐比值低于 0.3，只要存在重度高血压和终末器官受累表现，也不能排除有重症特征的子痫前期。

byChoice.en: Afebrile temperature does not explain the acute hypertensive emergency.
byChoice.zh: 无发热不能解释该急性高血压急症。

byChoice.en: A regular heart rate of 92 is not the cue requiring immediate follow-up here.
byChoice.zh: 规则心率 92 次/分不是本题需要立即追踪的关键线索。

byChoice.en: This is severe-range postpartum hypertension and requires immediate escalation.
byChoice.zh: 这是产后重度范围高血压，需要立即升级处理。

byChoice.en: Normal respirations and oxygenation are reassuring and do not indicate pulmonary edema.
byChoice.zh: 呼吸和氧合正常，较为安心，并不提示肺水肿。

byChoice.en: Rapid weight gain after discharge suggests acute fluid accumulation in context.
byChoice.zh: 出院后快速增重在此背景下提示急性液体潴留。

byChoice.en: Orientation is reassuring; it does not rule out preeclampsia but is not the abnormal cue.
byChoice.zh: 定向力正常较为安心；不能排除子痫前期，但不是异常线索。

byChoice.en: New facial and hand edema with tight rings supports fluid accumulation and worsening disease.
byChoice.zh: 新发面部和手部水肿、戒指变紧，支持液体潴留和病情恶化。

byChoice.en: A firm midline fundus below the umbilicus is expected postpartum involution.
byChoice.zh: 宫底脐下、质硬且居中符合产后子宫复旧。

byChoice.en: Scant serosa lochia without clots or odor is expected on postpartum day 5.
byChoice.zh: 产后第 5 天少量浆液性恶露、无血块或异味属于预期表现。

byChoice.en: Mild ecchymosis around a well-approximated repair is expected and lacks infection signs.
byChoice.zh: 修补处对合良好伴轻度瘀斑是常见表现，且无感染迹象。

byChoice.en: Breast engorgement with colostrum and no erythema or mass is expected early lactation.
byChoice.zh: 乳房胀满、有初乳且无红斑或肿块，符合早期泌乳表现。

byChoice.en: Clear lungs argue against pulmonary edema at admission.
byChoice.zh: 双肺清晰不支持入院时已有肺水肿。

byChoice.en: Normal heart sounds are not the concerning cue in this presentation.
byChoice.zh: 心音正常不是本次表现中的危险线索。

byChoice.en: RUQ and epigastric tenderness with elevated liver enzymes suggests hepatic involvement.
byChoice.zh: 右上腹和上腹压痛并伴肝酶升高，提示肝脏受累。

byChoice.en: Present bowel sounds are not a preeclampsia severe-feature cue.
byChoice.zh: 肠鸣音存在并不是子痫前期重症特征线索。

byChoice.en: Hyperreflexia with ankle clonus indicates neurologic irritability and seizure risk.
byChoice.zh: 反射亢进伴踝阵挛提示神经系统兴奋性增高和癫痫发作风险。

byChoice.en: A severe headache unrelieved by analgesics is a cerebral severe-feature symptom.
byChoice.zh: 止痛药不能缓解的严重头痛是脑部受累的重症特征。

byChoice.en: Visual scotomata are a severe-feature neurologic symptom.
byChoice.zh: 视觉暗点是神经系统受累的重症特征。

byChoice.en: No focal neurologic deficit is reassuring, though it does not negate the preeclampsia cues.
byChoice.zh: 无局灶性神经缺损较为安心，但不能抵消子痫前期线索。

byChoice.en: A single clear-yellow void of 200 mL is not oliguria and is not the main danger cue.
byChoice.zh: 一次排出 200 mL 清亮尿液并非少尿，也不是主要危险线索。

byChoice.en: Normal WBC and a mild postpartum hemoglobin decline are expected postpartum findings.
byChoice.zh: 白细胞正常、血红蛋白轻度产后下降属于预期产后表现。

byChoice.en: A platelet drop from 210,000 to 118,000 is a concerning hematologic trend.
byChoice.zh: 血小板从 210,000 降至 118,000 是令人担忧的血液学趋势。

byChoice.en: Creatinine rising from 0.7 to 1.2 indicates renal involvement.
byChoice.zh: 肌酐从 0.7 升至 1.2 提示肾脏受累。

byChoice.en: Marked AST and ALT elevation indicates hepatic involvement.
byChoice.zh: AST 和 ALT 明显升高提示肝脏受累。

byChoice.en: Normal coagulation studies do not indicate the hypertensive disorder is benign, but they are not the immediate cue here.
byChoice.zh: 凝血检查正常不能说明高血压疾病良性，但它们不是本题需要标出的立即追踪线索。

byChoice.en: Proteinuria below 0.3 does not rule out preeclampsia with severe features.
byChoice.zh: 蛋白/肌酐比值低于 0.3 不能排除有重症特征的子痫前期。

byChoice.en: Elevated LDH supports tissue injury/early hemolysis trend in this context.
byChoice.zh: LDH 升高在此背景下支持组织损伤或早期溶血趋势。

byChoice.en: No schistocytes on admission is not the abnormal cue, though smear trends should be monitored.
byChoice.zh: 入院时未见裂红细胞不是异常线索，但仍需追踪涂片变化。

testTakingStrategy.en: In a postpartum findings passage, separate normal recovery findings from severe-feature cues. Severe-range blood pressure, persistent neurologic symptoms, RUQ/epigastric pain, clonus, renal change, liver enzyme elevation, and falling platelets outrank reassuring lochia, fundal, breast, and perineal findings.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 阅读产后评估段落时，先把正常恢复表现与重症线索分开。重度范围血压、持续神经症状、右上腹/上腹痛、阵挛、肾功能变化、肝酶升高和血小板下降，比恶露、宫底、乳房和会阴等较安心的产后发现更优先。

glossary.defZh: 妊娠或产后出现的高血压疾病，可伴神经、肝脏、肾脏或血液系统受累。
视野中出现闪光点、黑点或局部看不清的视觉异常。
被动牵拉后出现的重复性肌肉收缩，提示神经系统兴奋性增高。
细胞损伤或溶血时可升高的实验室指标。

stem.en: Six hours after admission, the patient's blood pressure and symptoms have improved, but repeat laboratory results are available. For each finding, indicate whether it mainly shows therapeutic improvement or worsening disease progression that must be reported.
stem.zh: 入院 6 小时后，患者血压和症状有所改善，但复查实验室结果已出。请判断每项发现主要表示治疗后改善，还是提示病情进展并需要报告。

rows.en: Blood pressure is 138/86 after IV labetalol.
rows.zh: 静脉拉贝洛尔后血压为 138/86 mmHg。

rows.en: Headache decreased to 3/10 and scotomata resolved.
rows.zh: 头痛降至 3/10，视觉暗点已消失。

rows.en: AST increased from 142 U/L to 156 U/L and ALT increased from 128 U/L to 138 U/L.
rows.zh: AST 从 142 U/L 升至 156 U/L，ALT 从 128 U/L 升至 138 U/L。

rows.en: LDH increased from 380 U/L to 410 U/L and rare schistocytes are now seen.
rows.zh: LDH 从 380 U/L 升至 410 U/L，现可见少量裂红细胞。

rows.en: Serum magnesium is 5.2 mEq/L; respiratory rate is 16 and the patient is alert.
rows.zh: 血清镁 5.2 mEq/L；呼吸频率 16 次/分，患者清醒。

columns.en: Therapeutic improvement or expected treatment effect
columns.zh: 治疗改善或预期治疗作用

columns.en: Worsening disease progression; report to provider
columns.zh: 病情进展；需报告医务人员

correct.en: Lower blood pressure, decreased headache, resolved scotomata, therapeutic magnesium level, normal respiratory rate, and alert mental status show treatment response without magnesium toxicity. Falling platelets, rising transaminases, rising LDH, and new schistocytes indicate worsening end-organ injury and evolving HELLP syndrome despite the patient's subjective improvement; these objective trends must be reported.
correct.zh: 血压下降、头痛减轻、视觉暗点消失、血镁处于治疗范围、呼吸频率正常和意识清醒，说明治疗有效且没有镁中毒。血小板下降、转氨酶升高、LDH 升高和新出现裂红细胞提示终末器官损伤加重，并向 HELLP 综合征进展；即使患者主观症状改善，这些客观趋势也必须报告。

byChoice.en: Controlled blood pressure is an expected response to antihypertensive therapy.
byChoice.zh: 血压得到控制是降压治疗的预期反应。

byChoice.en: Improved neurologic symptoms suggest treatment response but do not override abnormal lab trends.
byChoice.zh: 神经症状改善提示治疗有效，但不能抵消异常实验室趋势。

byChoice.en: Falling platelets are an objective marker of worsening hematologic involvement.
byChoice.zh: 血小板下降是血液系统受累加重的客观指标。

byChoice.en: Rising AST and ALT indicate worsening hepatic involvement.
byChoice.zh: AST 和 ALT 升高提示肝脏受累加重。

byChoice.en: Rising LDH with schistocytes suggests hemolysis and evolving HELLP syndrome.
byChoice.zh: LDH 升高并出现裂红细胞，提示溶血及 HELLP 综合征进展。

byChoice.en: A therapeutic magnesium level with normal respirations and alertness supports expected magnesium effect, not toxicity.
byChoice.zh: 血镁在治疗范围内，且呼吸正常、意识清醒，支持预期镁剂作用而非中毒。

testTakingStrategy.en: Do not let symptom improvement hide worsening objective data. For hypertensive disorders of pregnancy, trend platelets, liver enzymes, LDH, creatinine, neurologic status, respirations, reflexes, and urine output together.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 不要因为症状改善而忽略客观数据恶化。对于妊娠/产后高血压疾病，要同时追踪血小板、肝酶、LDH、肌酐、神经状态、呼吸、反射和尿量。

glossary.defZh: 以溶血、肝酶升高和血小板低为特点的严重妊娠/产后高血压并发症。
红细胞碎片，可提示微血管性溶血。
用于子痫前期/子痫患者预防或控制癫痫发作的药物。

correct.en: This case tests recognition of postpartum preeclampsia with severe features after discharge and the ability to distinguish expected postpartum recovery findings from dangerous neurologic, renal, hepatic, hematologic, and fluid-retention cues. The unfolding course also shows that symptoms and blood pressure can improve while laboratory evidence of HELLP syndrome worsens.
correct.zh: 本病例考查出院后有重症特征的产后子痫前期识别，以及将正常产后恢复表现与危险的神经、肾脏、肝脏、血液系统和液体潴留线索区分开的能力。病例进展还显示，即使症状和血压改善，HELLP 综合征的实验室证据仍可能恶化。

testTakingStrategy.en: Use the postpartum context deliberately: some findings are normal recovery, but severe-range BP plus persistent headache, visual changes, RUQ/epigastric pain, clonus, rising creatinine, falling platelets, and elevated liver enzymes require immediate follow-up even without significant proteinuria.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 要有意识地利用产后背景：有些发现属于正常恢复，但重度范围血压加上持续头痛、视觉变化、右上腹/上腹痛、阵挛、肌酐升高、血小板下降和肝酶升高，即使没有明显蛋白尿，也需要立即追踪处理。

glossary.defZh: 分娩后出现的子痫前期，可首次发生在出院后。
通常指收缩压 ≥160 mmHg 或舒张压 ≥110 mmHg，需要快速评估和处理。
溶血、肝酶升高和血小板低的严重并发症。
硫酸镁蓄积导致反射消失、呼吸抑制和意识改变等危险表现。
